sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91333" key="pugoskeli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῡγο-σκελίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, waterbird <sense id="n91333.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with legs set far back</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">like</abbr> the grebe or puffin, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
